Class SimulationEngine

java.lang.Object
evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SimulationEngine extends Object implements Serializable
The core simulation engine that drives agent movement and danger zone propagation. Manages the graph, agents, and tick-based simulation loop.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructor
    Description
    SimulationEngine(Graph graph)
    Constructs a SimulationEngine for the given graph.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationEngine

      public SimulationEngine(Graph graph)
      Constructs a SimulationEngine for the given graph.
      Parameters:
      graph - the evacuation graph

  • Method Details

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent(Agent agent)
      Adds an agent to the simulation.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to add

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent(Agent agent)
      Removes an agent from the simulation.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to remove

    • addRandomAgents

      public void addRandomAgents(int count, int minSpeed, int maxSpeed, double minTolerance, double maxTolerance)
      Adds a specified number of random agents with randomized properties within the given ranges.
      Parameters:
      count - number of agents to add
      minSpeed - minimum speed value
      maxSpeed - maximum speed value
      minTolerance - minimum density tolerance
      maxTolerance - maximum density tolerance

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes (or reinitializes) the simulation. Resets the graph state (undo previous propagation), resets all agents, resets statistics, and initializes agents for movement.

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Advances the simulation by one tick. Propagates danger zones, moves agents, removes deleted agents, and checks for completion.

    • notifyGraphChanged

      public void notifyGraphChanged()
      Triggers a path recalculation for all non-arrived, non-waiting agents. Call this when the graph topology changes (danger zone spread, node/edge removed, etc.).

    • runSimulation

      public void runSimulation()
      Runs the full simulation synchronously from initialization to completion.

    • isFinished

      public boolean isFinished()
      Returns true if all agents have reached a terminal state (ARRIVED or BLOCKED).
      Returns:
      true if simulation is finished

    • onNodeRemoved

      public void onNodeRemoved(Node removedNode)
      Handles the removal of a node during an active simulation. Affected agents are redirected, panicked, or teleported as appropriate.
      Parameters:
      removedNode - the node being removed

    • findAvailableExit

      public Node findAvailableExit(Node from)
      Finds the nearest available exit from a given node using Euclidean distance.
      Parameters:
      from - the reference node
      Returns:
      the nearest open exit, or null if none available

    • distributeAgentsToExits

      public void distributeAgentsToExits()
      Redistributes all non-arrived agents across available exits using load balancing.

    • resetStats

      public void resetStats()
      Resets all node and edge statistics (agent passage counts).

    • getMovementStats

      public int[] getMovementStats()
      Returns movement state counts as an array: [waiting, moving, arrived, blocked].
      Returns:
      int array with counts for each movement state

    • getPsychologicalStats

      public int[] getPsychologicalStats()
      Returns psychological state counts as an array: [calm, panic, madness].
      Returns:
      int array with counts for each psychological state

    • getDensityPerNode

      public int[] getDensityPerNode()
      Returns agent density per node (index corresponds to graph.getNodes() order).
      Returns:
      int array of agent counts per node

    • getMaxDensity

      public int getMaxDensity()
      Returns the maximum agent density across all nodes.
      Returns:
      maximum density value (minimum 1)

    • getMaxEdgeCongestion

      public int getMaxEdgeCongestion()
      Returns the maximum agent count on any edge.
      Returns:
      maximum edge congestion (minimum 1)

    • save

      public void save(File f) throws IOException
      Saves the simulation state to a file.
      Parameters:
      f - the output file
      Throws:
      IOException - if serialization fails

    • load

      public static SimulationEngine load(File f) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Loads a simulation state from a file.
      Parameters:
      f - the input file
      Returns:
      the loaded SimulationEngine
      Throws:
      IOException - if deserialization fails
      ClassNotFoundException - if the class cannot be found

    • getTick

      public int getTick()
      Returns:
      the current tick number

    • isRunning

      public boolean isRunning()
      Returns:
      true if the simulation is currently running

    • getAgents

      public List<Agent> getAgents()
      Returns:
      the list of agents

    • getGraph

      public Graph getGraph()
      Returns:
      the simulation graph

    • setGraph

      public void setGraph(Graph g)
      Parameters:
      g - the new graph

      Deprecated.
      Use addAgent(Agent)

      Deprecated.

      Deprecated.

      @Deprecated public int getDensiteMax()
      Deprecated.
      Use getMaxDensity()

    • getCongestionMaxArete

      @Deprecated public int getCongestionMaxArete()
      Deprecated.
      Use getMaxEdgeCongestion()

    • sauvegarder

      @Deprecated public void sauvegarder(File f) throws IOException
      Deprecated.
      Use save(File)
      Throws:
      IOException

    • charger

      @Deprecated public static SimulationEngine charger(File f) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Deprecated.
      Use load(File)
      Throws:
      IOException
      ClassNotFoundException

    • isEnCours

      @Deprecated public boolean isEnCours()
      Deprecated.
      Use isRunning()
